stories.title: Phils blow rally after Realmuto's 'lapse' on bases...
stories.summary: J.T. Realmuto took the blame for a baserunning mistake that ended a potential Phillies rally in Tuesday night's 2-1 loss to the Dodgers.

stories.title: Curry first active player to have own wing in HOF
stories.summary: Stephen Curry will become the first active player to be honored at the Naismith Basketball Hall of Fame with his own exhibit when it opens to the public Friday.

stories.title: World Cup final tops 60M viewers in North America
stories.summary: A lot of things went right during this summer's World Cup, including record viewership numbers in North America for Spain's 1-0 win over Argentina in Sunday's final.
